title: Netherlock
description: A plugin to lock players out of nether dimention
body:
Netherlock is a plugin that can lock the nether dimension either 
### manually 
 using 
 /netherlock lock 
 and
 /netherlock unlock 
### automatically
 either by using commands
 /netherlock automode on/off
 /netherlock setopen [time]
 /netherlock setclose [time]
 or by using the plugin's config file
### localization
 you can customise the messages that the plugin displays by modifying them in the config file
